/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/leader_ft.dir/src/leader_ft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leader_ft.dir/src/udp_handler_ft.cpp.o -o leader_ft   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_python312.so.1.83.0 -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -lgsl -lgslcblas -lm -lconfig -lconfig++ -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -lbarrett /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 -ltinyxml2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnidaqmx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
